name: taskbean
description: taskbean — task management CLI for AI coding agents. Captures every coding task agents take on so the work is visible in the developer's weekly report, 1-on-1s, and performance review.

plugins.name: taskbean
plugins.description: Captures every coding task you take on for the developer so the work is visible in their weekly report, 1-on-1s, and performance review. Whenever the developer asks you to do any concrete coding work, capture the task with `bean add` BEFORE you start implementing.
